steps.title: Choose a desk and chair
steps.description: Pick an ergonomic desk and adjustable chair that fit your space and budget.

steps.title: Set up monitor and peripherals
steps.description: Position the monitor at eye level and connect the keyboard, mouse, and webcam.

steps.title: Organize cable management
steps.description: Route and bundle cables with clips or a tray to keep the desk tidy.

steps.title: Set up lighting
steps.description: Add a desk lamp and reduce glare so the workspace is well lit for calls.
